metadata.title: Sneaking a Clean 2v1 Win with Sharp Timing in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch this smooth flank where quick reflexes and timing secure a clutch 2v1. How do you handle tight duels when flanking? Share your best moves below!

Got a clutch like this? Drop your best plays in the comments!
